snapshot_note: Cached mode preserves the April 19, 2026 wallet snapshot from REPORT_1_ONCHAIN_FORENSICS.md; it does not imply current live balances.

known_events.event: 50K SOL sold from treasury-linked wallet after 2-year dormancy
497.11 BTC transferred from anonymous address to Rollbit
626.03 BTC transferred from anonymous address; some flow reported into Bybit and Rollbit
200 BTC transferred from Coinbase; some flow reported into Rollbit
$123M seized by Ukrainian authorities from Binance accounts linked to Bull Gaming N.V.
known_events.source: dev.ua, Pechersk District Court of Kyiv

manipulation_indicators.indicator: Treasury outflows meaningful relative to RLB liquidity

risk_indicators.name: Treasury Outflow Pressure
evidence: 2025-09-03: 50K SOL sold from treasury-linked wallet after 2-year dormancy ($10,170,000)
2026-01-11: 15K SOL transferred (batch 1) ($2,050,000)
2026-01-11: 15K SOL transferred (batch 2) ($2,040,000)

risk_indicators.name: Off-Wallet Custody Exposure
risk_indicators.description: $123,000,000 reported in an exchange/proxy custody event
evidence: Ukraine-linked reporting describes assets tied to Bull Gaming N.V. outside the public treasury wallet set
This is treated as a custody-location signal, not as proof of current wallet depletion

risk_indicators.name: RLB Liquidity and Price Stress
risk_indicators.description: RLB token declined 77% from highs while top-pool DEX liquidity remains thin
evidence: Claimed buyback mechanics depend on operator-reported revenue inputs
Top-pool visible liquidity is small relative to headline market capitalization
Token market depth should not be treated as reserve depth

risk_indicators.name: Visible Reserve Coverage
risk_indicators.description: Known wallet balances: $67,620,165.30 vs $123M reported off-wallet event scale
evidence: Known public wallets held ~$67,620,165 at the loaded snapshot
Public wallets do not expose total liabilities or exchange/proxy custody balances

risk_indicators.name: Public Web Verification Friction
risk_indicators.description: Main application is challenge-gated and public domain-level verification was not cleanly reproducible
evidence: rollbit.com is fronted by Cloudflare challenge infrastructure
blog.rollbit.com is separately hosted on Ghost/Fastly and remains indexable
The public certificate check path described in Report 4 did not produce a clean confirmation on the snapshot date

risk_indicators.name: Complaint Acceleration
risk_indicators.description: Counted public complaints rose from 2 in 2022 to 47 in 2025, with 13 more already visible in 2026 YTD
evidence: 2026 YTD: 13 cases ($46K)
Public resolution rate: 5.0% (4/80)
